label: SYNTHETIC FIXTURE OUTPUT - NOT FOR APPLICATION USE
strategy: Position as a Enterprise SaaS Product Manager with verified product outcomes, role-relevant evidence, and Product OS proof used only as supporting context.
headline: Senior Product Manager | Enterprise SaaS, Discovery & Workflow Adoption
summary_direction: Product leader focused on Enterprise SaaS Product Manager roles, with evidence across AI workflows, Product discovery, APIs, Technical roadmap. Selected proof points include JOV-REV-001, JOV-ENG-002, JOV-AI-003. This draft uses Product OS as a supporting proof layer while preserving employer experience, metrics, and interview-defensible claims.
sections_excluded: Detailed tools if space is constrained

gaps.gap: Deep enterprise integration or admin tooling ownership may need review
gaps.current_evidence: Enterprise workflow, onboarding, platform, and customer discovery evidence.
gaps.resume_mitigation: Use enterprise SaaS and platform evidence only where supported.
gaps.product_os_mitigation: Use Product Discovery Toolkit or JoVE brief.
gaps.interview_mitigation: Prepare examples of enterprise workflow prioritization.

human_review_decisions: Approve final contact details before live use
expected_recruiter_signal: Clear Enterprise SaaS Product Manager positioning with traceable evidence.
